Title: Allows municipalities to cancel any interest and penalties on delinquent property tax payments due to extraordinary circumstances, financial hardship or a history of previous timely payment of property taxes
Summary: Allows municipalities to cancel any interest and penalties on delinquent property tax payments where a property owner demonstrates extraordinary circumstances, financial hardship or a history of previous timely payment of property taxes; authorizes the commissioner of taxation and finance to promulgate rules and regulations for the application process, standards for documentation and guidance for enforcing officers.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to allowing municipalities to cancel any interest and penalties on delinquent property tax payments due to extraordinary circumstances, financial hardship or a history of previous timely payment of property taxes
